appearance.description: A disciplined guard wearing polished silver armor.

facts: The village walls are sturdy but we're short on patrols at night.
Wolves and goblins stalk the forest paths. Travel carefully after dark.
There have been some thefts reported. Bandits operating nearby.
Strange lights at a ruined castle north of here. Travelers speak of ghostly figures.
This village was founded over 300 years ago by settlers from the south.

conversation.greeting: The guard stands tall, hand resting on his sword. 'State your business, traveler.'

sword_techniques.greeting: Aldric's eyes light up. 'Ah, interested in the art of the sword? I can teach you five fundamental techniques if you've proven yourself.'
sword_techniques.farewell: Remember, technique is nothing without practice. Train hard, and you'll become a true swordsman.

available_quests.name: Patrol the Perimeter
available_quests.description: I need someone to help patrol the village perimeter. Strange noises have been reported at night.

steps.description: Patrol the village walls at night

appearance.description: A well-dressed merchant with a friendly smile and sharp eyes.

facts: The trade road runs north to the capital. South leads to the coast.
I trade with merchants from distant lands. Each has its own wonders.
The merchant guild protects our interests. Membership has its privileges.
Spices from the south are worth a fortune. But bandits have been hitting the caravans.

conversation.first_greeting: The merchant smiles warmly and bows slightly. 'Name's Elias. Welcome to my stall! I have all manner of goods from distant lands.'
conversation.greeting: Elias smiles warmly. 'Welcome to my stall! I have all manner of goods from distant lands.'
conversation.farewell: Elias nods cheerfully. 'Safe travels! Come back anytime.'

active_quest.name: Spice Trade
active_quest.description: I need someone to retrieve my lost spice shipment from bandits in the forest.

steps.description: Find the bandit camp in the forest

available_quests.name: Spice Trade
available_quests.description: I need someone to retrieve my lost spice shipment from bandits in the forest.

steps.description: Find the bandit camp in the forest

available_quests.name: Lesson: Sawing
available_quests.description: Learn to saw logs into planks at the woodshop.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Woodcrafting
available_quests.description: Learn to craft bows and staves from wood at the workbench.

appearance.description: A broad-shouldered man with soot-stained hands and a thick leather apron.

facts: I work iron and steel here. Good ore comes from the east.
This village was founded over 300 years ago. Settlers came from the south.
There are iron deposits in the eastern hills. The mines are dangerous but rich.

conversation.first_greeting: The blacksmith looks up from his anvil, wiping sweat from his brow. 'Name's Grim. I'm the village blacksmith. Need something forged or repaired?'
conversation.greeting: Grim looks up from his anvil, wiping sweat from his brow. 'Need something forged or repaired?'
conversation.farewell: Grim nods and returns to his work.

available_quests.name: Guard's Advice
available_quests.description: I've been hearing rumors from the merchants. Ask Aldric what he knows about the wolves. He'll have more details than I do.

available_quests.name: Wolves Menace
available_quests.description: The wolves in the forest have been getting bolder. Kill 5 of them and I'll reward you handsomely.

appearance.description: A warm-hearted woman with a ready smile and a towel over her shoulder.

facts: Plenty of talk these days. The merchants are restless.
Travelers passing through always have interesting tales to tell.
I've heard strange noises coming from the forest at night.
They say treasure is buried beneath the village. Old ruins to the north.
I'm working on a special brew. Just need one rare ingredient from the deep forest.

conversation.first_greeting: The bartender polishes a mug with a warm smile. 'Name's Meadow. Welcome to my tavern! What'll it be? We've got ale, mead, and stories.'
conversation.greeting: Meadow polishes a mug. 'What'll it be? We've got ale, mead, and stories.'
conversation.farewell: Meadow waves. 'Come back anytime! New stories every night.'

active_quest.name: Mystery Ingredient
active_quest.description: I'm trying to brew something special but I need a rare ingredient from the deep forest.

steps.description: Find the Moonflower in the deep forest

available_quests.name: Mystery Ingredient
available_quests.description: I'm trying to brew something special but I need a rare ingredient from the deep forest.

steps.description: Find the Moonflower in the deep forest

available_quests.name: Lesson: Preserving
available_quests.description: Learn to preserve food and ingredients at the kitchen.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Alchemy
available_quests.description: Learn to brew potions and elixirs at the cauldron.

appearance.description: A stout dwarf with a magnificent braided beard and piercing blue eyes. He wears formal guild robes over his armor.

facts: The goblin camp to the north has been causing trouble. Their chief leads a ruthless band.
The goblin shamans wield dark magic. They must be eliminated before they grow stronger.
The guild pays well for goblin ears. Bring me as many as you can carry.
I have bounties on the goblin chief and shamans. Dead or alive, though dead is easier.

conversation.first_greeting: The dwarf looks up from his ledger, his beard twitching. 'Ah, another adventurer! I am Thorin Ironvein, Guild Master. Looking for work?'
conversation.greeting: Thorin looks up from his ledger, his beard twitching. 'Ah, another adventurer! Looking for work?'
conversation.farewell: Thorin nods. 'May your blade be sharp and your purse heavy. Return when you have more ears!'

available_quests.name: Chief's Bounty
available_quests.description: The goblin chief has been terrorizing the region. Bring me his head and you'll be richly rewarded.

steps.description: Slay the Goblin Chief in his tent

available_quests.name: Shaman Hunt
available_quests.description: The goblin shamans are dark magic users. We need them eliminated before they summon something worse.

steps.description: Kill 4 goblin shamans in the camp

available_quests.name: Ears for Gold
available_quests.description: Bring me goblin ears and I'll pay you 1 gold per ear. No questions asked.

steps.description: Collect goblin ears from any goblin

appearance.description: A kind-faced priest in simple robes. He carries a wooden staff and radiates a gentle warmth.

facts: The church offers free healing to all who seek it. No payment required.
Those who fall in battle awaken in the graveyard, restored by divine light.
I am a priest of the Divine Light, keeper of the sacred healing arts.
The Divine Light grants us power to heal the wounded, protect the faithful, and smite the unholy.
Heal restores life. Bless strengthens the spirit. Purify cleanses corruption.
Divine Shield guards against harm. Holy Light banishes darkness. Resurrection conquers death itself.
All divine techniques require holy water - blessed water from the church altar.
Come, my child. Let me teach you the ways of the Light.

conversation.first_greeting: The priest smiles warmly, his eyes gentle. 'Welcome, my child. I am Father Benedict, servant of the Divine Light. The light is always here for those who seek it.'
conversation.greeting: Father Benedict smiles warmly. 'Welcome, child. The light of the Divine is always here for you.'
conversation.farewell: May the Divine watch over you, my child. Return whenever you need healing.

heal.greeting: Father Benedict nods with compassion. 'I sense the weight of your wounds, my child. Come, let the Divine light restore you.'
heal.farewell: You are fully restored. Go in peace, and may your path be blessed.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Heal
available_quests.description: Learn the basic healing technique from Father Benedict.

steps.description: Speak to Father Benedict about healing

available_quests.name: Lesson: Bless
available_quests.description: Father Benedict will teach you Bless, a divine technique that enhances combat abilities.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Purify
available_quests.description: Father Benedict will teach you Purify, a technique to remove negative effects.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Divine Shield
available_quests.description: Father Benedict will teach you Divine Shield, a protective barrier of holy light.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Holy Light
available_quests.description: Father Benedict will teach you Holy Light, a damaging spell effective against undead and demons.

available_quests.name: Lesson: Resurrection
available_quests.description: Father Benedict will teach you Resurrection, the most sacred divine technique that can restore life to the fallen.

appearance.unknown_name: a tall woman in practical leather armor
appearance.description: A tall, athletic woman with silver-streaked hair and piercing blue eyes. She wears practical leather armor and carries an elegant longsword at her hip. Her posture speaks of years of disciplined training.

facts: I am a master of the sword. I can teach you the ancient techniques of bladesmanship.
Each technique requires dedication and practice to master.
Draw Cut teaches precision. Riposte teaches counter-attack. Perfect Cut teaches armor penetration.
Come to me when you are ready to learn, and I will set you on the path.
To learn Draw Cut, you must prove your skill with accumulated sword damage.
To learn Riposte, you must demonstrate versatility against many foes.
To learn Perfect Cut, you must show patience and precision.
To learn Whirlwind, you must prove your mastery in chaotic combat.

conversation.first_greeting: the tall woman nods respectfully, her hand resting lightly on her sword hilt. 'I am Seraphina, Blade of the Guild. Master of the sword arts. What brings you here?'
conversation.greeting: Seraphina nods respectfully, her hand resting lightly on her sword hilt. 'I am Seraphina, master of the blade. What brings you to the guild?'
conversation.farewell: She gives a slight bow. 'Train hard, and the blade will serve you well.'

available_quests.name: Lesson: Draw Cut
available_quests.description: Seraphina will teach you Draw Cut, a swift drawing strike that excels against marked targets. To learn this technique, you must demonstrate proficiency with your sword by dealing 1000 total damage in combat.

steps.description: Speak to Seraphina to learn Draw Cut

available_quests.name: Lesson: Riposte
available_quests.description: Seraphina will teach you Riposte, a counter-attack technique that taunts your opponent. To master this, you must prove your adaptability by defeating 20 different creature types.

steps.description: Speak to Seraphina to learn Riposte

available_quests.name: Lesson: Perfect Cut
available_quests.description: Seraphina will teach you Perfect Cut, a precisely aimed strike that bypasses armor. This technique requires immense patience and precision. Practice your form by striking the ancient oak tree in the village graveyard 100 times.

steps.description: Practice striking the old oak tree 100 times in the graveyard
Speak to Seraphina to learn Perfect Cut

available_quests.name: Lesson: Whirlwind
available_quests.description: Seraphina will teach you Whirlwind, a devastating spinning attack that strikes all nearby enemies. This advanced technique requires mastery of chaos in combat. Defeat 3 or more enemies simultaneously on 10 separate occasions to prove your readiness.

steps.description: Defeat 3+ enemies at once on 10 occasions
Speak to Seraphina to learn Whirlwind

appearance.unknown_name: an elderly man in ornate robes
appearance.full_name: Eldric the Arcane, Master of the Guild
appearance.description: An elderly man with a long white beard and piercing blue eyes. He wears ornate blue robes embroidered with silver runes, and carries an ornate staff that glows with arcane energy.

facts: I am Eldric, master of the arcane arts. I can teach you the fundamentals of magic.
Arcane magic requires focus - a staff or wand - and runestones to channel power.
Staves amplify spell damage, while wands reduce cooldowns. Choose your path wisely.
Each technique requires dedication. Come to me when you are ready to begin your training.
Magic Missile is your first spell - a reliable bolt of arcane energy.
Mana Shield provides protection by creating a barrier of pure magic.
Arcane Sight reveals hidden auras and enhances your perception.
Teleport allows instant movement, but requires precise control.

conversation.first_greeting: The archmage smiles warmly, his staff glowing with soft blue light. 'Ah, a seeker of arcane knowledge. I am Eldric the Arcane, master of this tower. What brings you here?'
conversation.greeting: Eldric smiles warmly, his staff glowing with soft blue light. 'Ah, a seeker of arcane knowledge. I am Eldric. What brings you to the church?'
conversation.farewell: He nods thoughtfully. 'May your studies be fruitful, and your runestones plentiful.'

available_quests.name: Lesson: Magic Missile
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Magic Missile, a fundamental arcane spell that launches a bolt of energy guaranteed to strike your target. To learn this, you must study the arcane arts by reading 5 arcane texts or scrolls.

steps.description: Speak to Eldric to learn Magic Missile

available_quests.name: Lesson: Mana Shield
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Mana Shield, a defensive spell that creates a protective barrier of arcane energy. To master this, you must demonstrate control over your arcane reserves by casting 20 spells without being interrupted.

steps.description: Speak to Eldric to learn Mana Shield

available_quests.name: Lesson: Arcane Sight
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Arcane Sight, a perception spell that reveals hidden magical auras. To master this, you must demonstrate keen observation by identifying 15 hidden objects or secrets in the world.

steps.description: Speak to Eldric to learn Arcane Sight

available_quests.name: Lesson: Teleport
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Teleport, a movement spell that allows instant short-distance travel. To master this, you must demonstrate spatial awareness by exploring 10 different locations in the world.

steps.description: Speak to Eldric to learn Teleport

available_quests.name: Lesson: Arcane Explosion
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Arcane Explosion, a powerful area-of-effect spell that unleashes a burst of arcane energy on all nearby enemies. To master this, you must demonstrate mastery of area control by defeating 5 groups of 3 or more enemies simultaneously.

steps.description: Defeat 5 groups of 3+ enemies with area attacks
Speak to Eldric to learn Arcane Explosion

available_quests.name: Lesson: Reality Tear
available_quests.description: Eldric will teach you Reality Tear, the most devastating arcane spell that tears a rift in reality itself. This forbidden technique requires absolute mastery. To prove your readiness, you must defeat 3 boss-level creatures.

steps.description: Speak to Eldric to learn Reality Tear

appearance.description: A weathered hunter with keen eyes and a scar across his cheek. He moves with quiet grace and carries an array of traps and tracking tools.

facts: I can teach you the art of the hunt. Track prey, set traps, and strike from the shadows.
The wilderness is unforgiving. Learn to move silently and you'll have the advantage.

conversation.first_greeting: The Huntsman nods at you, his eyes sharp and alert. 'Name's Ben. I'm the huntsman. Looking to learn the ways of the hunt?'
conversation.greeting: Ben nods at you, his eyes sharp and alert. 'Looking to learn the ways of the hunt?'
conversation.farewell: Ben gives you a respectful nod. 'May your aim be true and your steps silent.'

available_quests.name: Learn Death Mark
available_quests.description: The hunter will teach you Death Mark, a technique to mark targets for increased damage.

available_quests.name: Learn Track Prey
available_quests.description: Learn to track prey from the huntsman.

available_quests.name: Learn Bear Trap
available_quests.description: Learn to craft and use bear traps.

available_quests.name: Learn Silent Step
available_quests.description: Learn to move silently like a hunter.

available_quests.name: Learn Large Trap
available_quests.description: Learn to craft larger, more effective traps.

available_quests.name: Learn Pacify Prey
available_quests.description: Learn to pacify prey before the kill.

available_quests.name: Learn Loot
available_quests.description: Learn to find better loot from your kills.

appearance.description: A sturdy woman with dirt under her nails and a basket of vegetables at her side.

facts: The fields produce good harvests. Autumn is the busiest season.
Spring planting, autumn harvest. Winter is harsh in these parts.
Healing herbs near the old oak tree. The apothecary pays well for them.
This village was founded over 300 years ago. Settlers came from the south.
The forest has many useful plants if you know where to look.

conversation.first_greeting: The farmer looks up from her vegetables with a warm smile. 'Hello there! I'm Bertha, the village farmer. Looking for fresh produce?'
conversation.greeting: Bertha looks up from her vegetables. 'Hello there! Looking for fresh produce?'
conversation.farewell: Bertha smiles. 'Take care, and come back for the freshest goods in town!'

active_quest.name: Herb Collection
active_quest.description: I need someone to gather some rare herbs from the forest for my special recipes.

steps.description: Find 5 Healing Herbs in the forest

available_quests.name: Herb Collection
available_quests.description: I need someone to gather some rare herbs from the forest for my special recipes.

steps.description: Find 5 Healing Herbs in the forest
